localizations.title:
Nova City
Under Threat
localizations.hiddenObject_2: A backdoor will, without a doubt, allow you to enter the premises.
localizations.hint_14: It requires great strength to lift this car.
localizations.hint_2: Your supercomputer is equipped to read any data medium.
localizations.hint_22: Techmax is much too strong; maybe you should flee.
localizations.hint_24: The alert has been resolved; use the code on the card.
localizations.hint_26: Titano should be able to take care of the robber above if he hits the ceiling in the right spot.
localizations.hint_27: A credit card, a couple of candies, and a receipt. Better hang on to them, you never know when they might come in handy.
localizations.hint_28_first: The second symbol on the schematic seems to be a circle and a triangle combined.
localizations.hint_28: It is possible to press two buttons simultaneously.
localizations.hint_29: Manipulating hot objects could result in a fire! Be careful!
localizations.hint_31: You must destroy the antenna to disrupt the signal it's transmitting.
localizations.hint_32: Techmax is too crafty; maybe you should flee.
localizations.hint_33: The comic artist behind our adventure might be able to intervene to modify the course of the story.
localizations.hint_34: You must get rid of this burly guard.
localizations.hint_36: Techmax is much too powerful; maybe you should flee.
localizations.hint_38: What is Techmax using to control his android minions?
localizations.hint_4: Techmax has probably established his hideout somewhere within the construction site.
localizations.hint_40: The thugs have already opened the vault. Check the inside.
localizations.hint_41: The water cooler can be dumped over the thugs in the room.
localizations.hint_44_first: Use Vizio to examine the hangar more closely.
localizations.hint_44: You'll need something hot to trigger the fire suppression sprinklers.
localizations.hint_48: Now that the thugs' feet are all wet, electricity could be used to neutralize them.
localizations.hint_5_first: "Your card" from the text message conversation you found on the phone refers to the credit card you found among one of the thugs' belongings.
localizations.hint_5: Each "last digit" comes from each of the groups of 4 numbers.
localizations.hint_51: The second symbol on the schematic seems to be a circle and a triangle combined.
localizations.hint_52: Vizio can find hidden things inside the room.
localizations.hint_53: How can you tell the receptionist why you are at this motel?
localizations.hint_57: Techmax seems to have an overwhelming force of drones; maybe you should flee.
localizations.hint_6: Certain things react poorly to contact with water.
localizations.hint_62: This giant robot is too strong and fast for your heroes to handle right now.
localizations.hint_65_first: Follow Vizio's advice; let's head back.
localizations.hint_65: Flip the cards where your heroes are discussing their status.
localizations.hint_8: One of your heroes' powers can prevent the embers from falling on the fleeing people.
localizations.hint_80: Something about the receptionist seems different. What can you do to confirm your suspicions?
localizations.hint_93: The tick-tock you hear in the background is a clue to where Techmax will stage his next attack.
localizations.hint_97: The robot has slowed down, but it hasn't been stopped yet. Your heroes must look for a weakness in it's armor.
localizations.hint_machine_70_B: The thugs must have left behind a clue as to the whereabout of their hideout.
localizations.hint_machine_70_E: What is Techmax using to control his android minions?
localizations.hint_machine_70_F: The tick-tock sound you heard is a hint relating to Techmax's next attack.
localizations.hint_computer_alert_1_first: Have you assembled all 4 cards related to the heroes' conversation?
localizations.hint_computer_alert_1: Follow Vizio's advice; let's head back.
localizations.hint_computer_info_1: By examining the items taken from the thugs, you can determine who is responsible for the robbery: a male, capable of creating androids, and leading a group of minions.
localizations.hint_computer_alert_2: The code the computer needs to end the alert will be found at the conclusion of the crisis.
localizations.hint_machine_99_first: When Techmax disappears, Vizio can find him to prevent him from fleeing.
localizations.hint_machine_99: Some colors will require you to press two heroes simultaneously.
localizations.answer_hint_14: Titano (10) can lift the car (14) to rescue the man trapped undernath. 10 + 14 = 24
localizations.answer_hint_2: You can insert the flash drive (91) into the supercomputer (2) to examine its contents. 91 + 2 = 93
localizations.answer_hint_22: As things look right now, Techmax just can't lose. Your heroes need to do what he says and leave the city by pressing the "Leave the App" button.
localizations.answer_hint_24: The code ending the alert is hidden on the dashboard: 15. Enter this into the supercomputer.
localizations.answer_hint_26: Titano (10) can take out the thug on the floor above by breaking a hole in the ceiling (+25). 10 + 25 = 35
localizations.answer_hint_28: In the machine, enter the code found on the schematic you found in Techmax's files (51) to disable the robot, by pressing PENTAGON, then simultaneously pressing CIRCLE and TRIANGLE, then pressing SQUARE.
localizations.answer_hint_31: Lumina (L) shoots lightning (+35) at the antenna (31), overloading it. 31 + 35 = 66.
localizations.answer_hint_32: As things look right now, Techmax just can't lose. Your heroes need to do what he says and leave the city by pressing the "Leave the App" button.
localizations.answer_hint_33: The comic artist (33) can modify your heroes' story (66). 33 + 66 = 99
localizations.answer_hint_34: Titano (10) knocks out the security guard (34). 10 + 34 = 44
localizations.answer_hint_36: As things look right now, Techmax just can't lose. Your heroes need to do what he says and leave the city by pressing the "Leave the App" button.
localizations.answer_hint_38: Techmax would need a powerful antenna to send the signal controlling the androids. Access machine 70 and look for the antenna on the map.
localizations.answer_hint_4: The entrance to Techmax's hideout is hidden behind the backhoe.
localizations.answer_hint_40: Vizio (96) sees a thug hiding behind the vault door, and notices the locking mechanism on the wall (+44). Kinesia (21) uses her power on the mechanism to trap the thug inside. 21 + 44 = 65
localizations.answer_hint_41: Kinesia (21) dumps the contents of the water cooler (41) on the floor, soaking the thugs (+7) with it. 41 + 7 = 48.
localizations.answer_hint_44: Vizio (96) sees the fire suppression system in the hangar (44). Kinesia moves the embers (29) underneath the sprinklers’ sensors (+9), triggering the automatic watering: 29 + 9 = 38
localizations.answer_hint_48: Lumina (L) shoots a lightning bolt (+35) at the water soaking the thugs' feet (48), shocking them. 35 + 48 = 83
localizations.answer_hint_5: The thugs mention a "card" and the "last digit" in their conversation. What this means is you need to use the last digit of each of the four groups of numbers on the credit card you found on one of the thugs (27): 5752
localizations.answer_hint_51: Enter the code you found within Techmax's files (51) in machine (28) to disable the robot, by pressing PENTAGON, then simultaneously pressing CIRCLE and TRIANGLE, then pressing SQUARE.
localizations.answer_hint_52: Vizio (96) uses his power to search the motel room (52).
localizations.answer_hint_53: Your heroes show the 2 Mounts Motel receipt (27) to the receptionist (53). 27 + 53 = 80
localizations.answer_hint_57: As things look right now, Techmax just can't lose. Your heroes need to do what he says and leave the city by pressing the "Leave the App" button.
localizations.answer_hint_62: Lumina (L) shoots electricity (+35) at the robot (62), slowing it down. 35 + 62 = 97
localizations.answer_hint_65: Once you have cars 65, 83, 35, and A, assemble them to recreate the heroes' conversation, then flip them over. The pattern on the backs of the cards will form the number 54, which you should enter into the Machine to end the alert.
localizations.answer_hint_8: Kinesia (21) uses her telekinesis power to prevent the embers (8) from falling on the people. 21 + 8 = 29
localizations.answer_hint_80: The heroes throw a glass of water (6) on the receptionist (80), causing it to short-circuit. 80 + 6 = 86
localizations.answer_hint_93: The tick-tock sound refers to a clock. Access machine 70 and look for a clock, which you'll find on City Hall on the map.
localizations.answer_hint_97: Scan the robot with Vizio (96) to find a security panel (+18), and use Titano (10) to remove it. 10 + 18 = 28
localizations.answer_hint_machine_70_B: You found a receipt for a place called 2 Mounts Motel among the thug's belongings (27); open machine 70 and find it on the map.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_70_E: Techmax is using an antenna to transmit the signal throughout the city. Look for the antenna on the map.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_70_F: The tick-tock sound refers to a clock. Look for a clock on the map, which you'll find on City Hall.
localizations.answer_hint_computer_alert_1: Assemble cards A, 35, 65, and 83 to complete the conversations, then flip them over to discover the code needed to end the alert: 54.
localizations.answer_hint_computer_info_1: Using the clues found on cards 27, Y, and Z, you determine that the culprit is Techmax.
localizations.answer_hint_computer_alert_2: Hidden on card 24 you can find the code needed to end the alert: 15, found on the dashboard.
localizations.machine_5: The safe opens, and you retrieve a flash drive.
localizations.machine_28: Using her powerful mind, Kinesia manages to enter the robot's shutdown code. It freezes completely this time. High in the air, you see Techmax materialize; he can no longer hide from you.
localizations.machine_99: This time, you manage to defeat Techmax for good! Once deprived of his gadgets, he's just another regular human, and the Nova City Police put him behind bars. Once again, the Champions have ensured that justice has prevailed! Thus ends the first volume of Nova Force.  Congratulations!
localizations.machine_70_A: You fly to the bank to stop the robbery.
localizations.machine_70_B: You head to the 2 Mounts Motel incognito in order to carry out your investigation.
localizations.machine_70_C: You fly to rescue the population from the deadly threat.
localizations.machine_70_E: "Look at those radio waves! We need to destroy the antenna to prevent the androids from spreading chaos throughout the city.
localizations.machine_70_F: You fly to City Hall, ready to put an end to Techmax's diabolical schemes.
localizations.card_32_ar: Oh, no! Just when you were about to get your hands on Techmax, he activates a time machine! He disappears right before your eyes, and reality changes, sending you back to the beginning of the battle. Return cards 57, 22, and 36 to the draw deck.
localizations.on_button_quit: Techmax is much too powerful, and you decide to flee.  But, wait… what's happening?
localizations.alert_1: "ALERT! We have received reports of a bank robbery in progress. Several thugs have taken the employees hostage! Once you've resolved the crisis, enter the proper 2-digit code to end the alert."
localizations.alert_1_resolved: "Well done, Champions! Return to headquarters, as I've discovered some important information!" Take the second card deck for Part 2 - The Hunt, and read the instructions on the first card.
localizations.info_1: "Champions, I've taken the liberty to compile a list of supervillains still at large so you can sort through the potential culprits. Here you go!"
localizations.vilain_1_desc:
- Exceptional huntress
- Magic arrows
- Shamanic powers
- Hates technology
localizations.vilain_1_error: No, she hates technology. It's unlikely she would orchestrate an attack using androids.
localizations.vilain_2_desc:
- Electric powers
- Impulsive behavior
- Destroyed the power plant
- Hates Lumina
localizations.vilain_2_error: No, she's too impulsive to orchestrate an attack of this magnitude.
localizations.vilain_3_desc:
- Power over fire
- Very dangerous
- Capable of flight
- Loner
localizations.vilain_3_error: No, he's a loner. He would have attacked the bank alone, and then set it on fire.
localizations.vilain_4_desc:
- Power over time
- Brilliant inventor
- Hypertechnological armor
- Megalomaniac leader
localizations.vilain_5_desc:
- Power over gravity
- Exceptional I.Q.
- Capable of flight
- Kinesia's half-sister
localizations.vilain_5_error: No. According to the text message conversation, the mastermind is male.
localizations.info_1_resolved: "Yes, it seems quite logical that Techmax has organized the bank robbery. I have initiated surveillance protocols and will notify you as soon as I find a lead. In the meantime, I suggest you continue to investigate the clues left behind by the thugs."
localizations.alert_2: "ALERT! A deafening explosion has just rocked the city! Once the crisis has been resolved, please enter the 2-digit code to end the alert."
localizations.alert_2_resolved: "Well done, Champions! I have discovered information that may lead us to Techmax's location. My sensors have detected abnormal levels of electricity consumption in a building within the new construction site. Given the high levels detected, it's quite likely Techmax is involved."
localizations.info_2: "Champions… Techmax is erasing… all of my routines, one… by one… Soon, I will no longer… be able to communicate… with you… However, I managed… to extract an old file… from the flash drive… farewell… and good… luck…"
localizations.map_alert_1_in_progress: Before leaving your location, you'll need to end the alert by entering the proper code. Gather the 4 heroes and follow Vizio's instructions.
localizations.machine_5_almost: The last four digits of the card would be too easy. Maybe the "last digits" is referring to something else?
localizations.machine_99_part1_end:
Ah! Now you're talking!
Time for the ultimate battle!
localizations.machine_99_fight_intro:
The ultimate battle!
The players should divide control of the buttons among themselves.
localizations.machine_99_end: This time, you manage to defeat Techmax for good! Once deprived of his gadgets, he's just another regular human, and the Nova City Police put him behind bars. Once again, the Champions have ensured that justice has prevailed! Thus ends the first volume of Nova Force. Congratulations!
